com.pax.poslink.entity

Class UploadResult

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.entity.UploadResult

  • public class UploadResult
extends java.lang.Object
    The Result of AbstractPosLink.uploadLog(String[]).

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      boolean isSuccessful
      Returns true if both the terminal and POSLink upload logs successfully.
      java.lang.String posLinkUploadErrorCode
      POSLink Upload Error Code:
      java.lang.String sn
      Terminal SN.

      Terminal Upload Error Code:

    • Field Detail

      • isSuccessful

        public boolean isSuccessful
        Returns true if both the terminal and POSLink upload logs successfully.

      • sn

        public java.lang.String sn
        Terminal SN.

      • terminalUploadErrorCode

        public java.lang.String terminalUploadErrorCode
        Terminal Upload Error Code:

        0 - OK
        1 - COMM ERROR
        2 - ABORTED
        3 - CONNECT ERROR
        4 - UNKNOW ERROR
        5 - SFTP COMM ERROR
        6 - NO DATA TO UPLOAD

      • posLinkUploadErrorCode

        public java.lang.String posLinkUploadErrorCode
        POSLink Upload Error Code:

        0 - OK
        1 - POSLink SFTP connect error
        2 - POSLink upload data error
        3 - POSLink no data to upload

    • Constructor Detail

      • UploadResult

        public UploadResult()
